fragment.choose:
<when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("isStream","false").Equals("true", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))">
            <set-variable name="streamUsage" value="@{
                int inTok  = 0;
                int outTok = 0;
                try {
                    var raw = context.Response.Body.As(preserveContent: true) ?? "";
                    // Each SSE event is two lines: `event: ` + `data: `. Split on blank lines.
                    foreach (var chunk in raw.Split(new[] { "\n\n" }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries)) {
                        string evt = null; string dataLine = null;
                        foreach (var line in chunk.Split('\n')) {
                            if (line.StartsWith("event:")) evt = line.Substring(6).Trim();
                            else if (line.StartsWith("data:")) dataLine = line.Substring(5).Trim();
                        }
                        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(dataLine)) continue;
                        try {
                            var j = JObject.Parse(dataLine);
                            if (evt == "message_start") {
                                var u = (JObject)j["message"]?["usage"];
                                if (u != null) {
                                    inTok  = (int?)u["input_tokens"]  ?? inTok;
                                    outTok = (int?)u["output_tokens"] ?? outTok;
                                }
                            } else if (evt == "message_delta") {
                                var u = (JObject)j["usage"];
                                if (u != null) {
                                    outTok = (int?)u["output_tokens"] ?? outTok; // overwrites with terminal final
                                }
                            }
                        } catch { /* skip malformed SSE chunk */ }
                    }
                } catch { /* fall through with zeros */ }
                return new JObject(
                    new JProperty("input",  inTok),
                    new JProperty("output", outTok),
                    new JProperty("total",  inTok + outTok)
                ).ToString();
            }" />
            
            
            

            
            @{
                return new JObject(
                    new JProperty("id", "anthropic-stream-" + Guid.NewGuid().ToString()),
                    new JProperty("timestamp", DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")),
                    new JProperty("month", DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("yyyy-MM")),
                    new JProperty("targetService", "anthropic"),
                    new JProperty("model", (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model", "NA")),
                    new JProperty("userOid", (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("userOid", "NA")),
                    new JProperty("userUpn", (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("userUpn", "NA")),
                    new JProperty("subscriptionId", context.Subscription?.Id?.ToString() ?? "Portal-Admin"),
                    new JProperty("productName", context.Product?.Name?.ToString() ?? "anthropic"),
                    new JProperty("isStream", true),
                    new JProperty("promptTokens",   (int)context.Variables["promptTokens"]),
                    new JProperty("responseTokens", (int)context.Variables["responseTokens"]),
                    new JProperty("totalTokens",    (int)context.Variables["totalTokens"])
                ).ToString();
            }
